Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 85 

EMER _USE_SW 

LABEL: Emergency Use Switch 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates that the service was provided as part of an emergency use authorization (EUA). 

SHORT NAME: EMER_USE_SW 

LONG NAME: EMER_USE_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH (derived) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2021. 

This field is derived when the condition code (CLM RLT COND CD) is
